country_result:
Country: Montenegro
Coordinates: 42.75, 19.10
Reasoning: Montenegro received the strongest support across multiple agents, particularly from the Landscape Agent who noted the rugged limestone karst and specific vegetation as "extremely common" in the Montenegrin highlands. The Meta Agent further supported this by identifying the specific style of concrete retaining walls and Gen 3 camera quality as highly characteristic of rural Montenegro. While similar to Bosnia and Herzegovina and Croatia, the combination of the specific architectural style (white masonry with red tiles) and the stark karst topography points most strongly to Montenegro.
